retrieved_sources: HackerRank Support - Assessments; HackerRank Support - Plagiarism; HackerRank Support - Account
response:
Thank you for contacting us.

Based on our support documentation:

HackerRank Assessments allow companies to screen candidates using coding tests. Candidates receive a link via email. Each assessment has a time limit set by the recruiter. Candidates can code in multiple languages. Submissions are auto-evaluated against hidden test cases. Proctoring features may include webcam monitoring, tab-switch detection, and copy-paste restrictions. Results are shared with the hiring company, not directly to the candidate.

For more information, please visit: https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/articles/assessments.

If this doesn't resolve your issue, please reply and we'll assist further.
